meta.product: No.01 The Daily — 5g Creapure creatine + 5g Verisol collagen + complete multivitamin, 14g scoop, strawberry lemonade
meta.notes: Prompts for AI image/video tools (Higgsfield-style). British English on-screen text. No medical imagery, no before/after, no body transformation, no fake reviews or trust badges, no children, no pregnancy imagery, no unlicensed third-party logos. Product pack renders must match real label artwork before publishing — composite the real pack shot where possible. All outputs are drafts; human approves before use.
meta.shared_negative_prompt: medical imagery, doctors, white coats, hospital, syringes, pills, before and after comparison, body transformation, weight loss, tape measure, scales, fake review stars, trust badges, award seals, children, babies, pregnancy, pregnant belly, third-party logos, brand logos other than HerBody, text artifacts, distorted hands, extra fingers, watermark

prompts.prompt: Premium supplement pouch on a warm oak kitchen counter, soft morning window light, a matte glass shaker beside it, scattered strawberry and lemon slices, minimal editorial styling, muted warm palette, photorealistic product photography, shallow depth of field
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark, distorted text
prompts.compliance_notes: No claims in image; text is formula statement only. Composite real pack artwork before publish.

prompts.prompt: Extreme close-up macro of a clean supplement facts label, crisp typography listing doses, finger tracing a line, natural daylight, editorial minimalism, cream and charcoal palette, photorealistic
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, illegible gibberish text, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Replace generated label with real label artwork before publish — never publish an AI-invented ingredient panel.

prompts.prompt: Cinematic vertical video: woman in her early 30s in soft morning kitchen light scoops pink powder into a glass of water, shakes a bottle for ten seconds, takes a calm sip by the window, rain outside, warm natural grade, handheld feel, no dramatic reactions, realistic UK flat interior
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, gym mirror selfies, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, oversexualised framing, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Training days and rest days. Same scoop.
prompts.compliance_notes: Model is brand talent, not a customer; no voiceover claims. Woman depicted 22–38, clearly adult.

prompts.prompt: Ultra slow-motion macro: fine pale-pink powder pouring from a 14g scoop into clear cold water, swirling dissolution clouds, backlit, soft pink-to-cream gradient background, satisfying ASMR aesthetic, studio product videography
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, pills, capsules, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Purely sensory; no claims.

prompts.concept: The maths — seven bottles vs one pouch
prompts.prompt: Flat lay on linen: seven generic unlabelled white supplement bottles arranged on the left, a single elegant pouch on the right, equals-sign composition, soft daylight, editorial catalogue style, generic blank labels only
prompts.negative_prompt: real brand labels, third-party logos, medical imagery, pills spilling excessively, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Bottles must be generic/unlabelled. Ad copy must carry the verify-prices footnote: '*Typical UK retail for comparable separates, checked at time of publication.'

prompts.concept: Myth-bust title card — creatine for women
prompts.prompt: Bold editorial vertical title card: deep plum background, oversized cream serif text area, a single steel scoop of powder centre-frame casting soft shadow, premium print-magazine energy, minimal
prompts.negative_prompt: gym bro imagery, bodybuilder, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Creatine isn't just for gym bros.
prompts.compliance_notes: Opinion/education framing; performance claim only in landing copy using authorised wording.

prompts.prompt: Studio still life: supplement pouch beside a crisp printed certificate of analysis on a clipboard, batch code tag reading HB-26·0417, cool daylight, laboratory-adjacent but domestic table setting, honest documentary photography style
prompts.negative_prompt: white coats, laboratory glassware, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, official-looking award seals, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Tested for purity — every single batch.
prompts.compliance_notes: Certificate must be real COA artwork or clearly stylised — no fabricated official seals or accreditation marks.

prompts.prompt: Vertical video: hands level off a half scoop of pale powder against soft dawn light, calendar page showing days 1 to 7, cosy knitwear, gentle pastel morning palette, calm pacing, photorealistic lifestyle
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, dosage syringes, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Week one: half scoop. The gentle way to start.
prompts.compliance_notes: No implication that half-scoop prevents side effects — 'gentle way to start' only.

prompts.prompt: Elegant still life: supplement pouch on marble with soft gold evening light, small neutral certification document card beside it, refined and respectful composition, premium editorial photography
prompts.negative_prompt: religious symbols used decoratively, mosque imagery as prop, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, invented certification seals, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Use the real HMC mark only with licence confirmation; otherwise text-only reference. Respectful, factual framing — certification is a document, not an aesthetic.

prompts.prompt: Warm minimal 2D animation: two glowing tokens drift from a supplement pouch into a stylised phone screen, then split across eight abstract cause icons (house, heart, book shapes), soft plum and cream palette, hopeful and dignified tone, smooth motion design
prompts.negative_prompt: sad imagery, crying faces, poverty imagery, shelters depicted literally, children, pregnancy imagery, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, third-party charity logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Every pouch earns 2 tokens. You choose the cause.
prompts.compliance_notes: Solidarity not saviour: abstract icons only, no depicted recipients, no named partners (unsigned). '20% of profits, audited' in caption.

prompts.prompt: Clean vertical graphic: a single coffee cup and a supplement scoop side by side on a café table, soft London morning street bokeh through window, warm documentary photography, space at top third for text
prompts.negative_prompt: coffee chain logos, third-party logos, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Price frame factual: £33.99 ÷ 21 servings. No coffee-brand marks.

prompts.prompt: Vertical motion graphic: the word Creapure-style placeholder replaced by 'Creatine monohydrate 5g' in bold cream serif over slow-macro footage of crystalline powder, deep plum overlay, kinetic type reveals '5g' large, premium supplement editorial motion
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, molecular diagrams implying medical effect, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Use Creapure® wordmark only per licensor brand guidelines; otherwise 'creatine monohydrate'.

prompts.prompt: Vertical motion graphic: silky powder ribbon dissolving in water, golden hour light, kinetic typography reveals 'Collagen peptides 5g', calm luxurious pacing, cream and blush palette without pink-washing, premium
prompts.negative_prompt: skin close-ups implying results, wrinkles smoothing animation, before and after, body transformation, medical imagery, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Verisol® bioactive collagen peptides. 5g — a full studied serving.
prompts.compliance_notes: No skin-result visuals. Verisol® wordmark per licensor guidelines. Pair only with vitamin C authorised claim in caption.

prompts.prompt: Bright appetising still life: tall glass of pale pink drink with condensation, fresh strawberries and lemon wheels, striped paper straw, summer window light, crisp food-photography style, no added-sugar clean styling
prompts.negative_prompt: sweets, candy, syrup drizzle, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Pair with 30-day flavour guarantee copy; guarantee is refund-if-you-hate-it, phrase exactly.

prompts.prompt: Vertical documentary montage: London skyline at dawn, courier bike crossing a bridge, hands sealing a shipping box with a pouch inside, warm honest grade, real-city texture, no landmarks under licence restrictions
prompts.negative_prompt: factory interiors implying pharma, white coats, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Made in the UK. Ships from London.
prompts.compliance_notes: GMP claim in caption text only, phrased 'made in a GMP-certified UK facility'.

prompts.prompt: Candid lifestyle: woman around 30 at an office kitchen counter shaking a matte bottle, laptop bag over shoulder, morning commute energy, natural imperfect light, editorial realism, warm neutral wardrobe
prompts.negative_prompt: gym clothes, athleisure cliché, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Brand talent, not a customer. Adult 22–38 depiction.

prompts.prompt: Vertical stop-motion: the same kitchen counter across 21 mornings, light shifting day to day, the pouch gradually flattening, a small tally growing on a notepad, charming handcrafted stop-motion feel, warm palette
prompts.negative_prompt: body shots, mirror shots, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Time passing shows habit, never body change.

prompts.prompt: Minimal infographic illustration: a single scoop silhouette at centre, two bold pillars labelled areas either side and a row of eleven small dots beneath, architectural blueprint style in cream on deep plum, elegant grid, generous negative space
prompts.negative_prompt: medical diagrams, anatomy, body silhouettes, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.compliance_notes: Structural fact only; no function claims in the graphic.

prompts.concept: Q&A card — is creatine safe for women
prompts.prompt: Vertical editorial card: large cream serif question mark motif over deep plum, cut to calm desk scene with open research papers and highlighter, thoughtful academic-but-warm styling, soft lamp light
prompts.negative_prompt: medical imagery, doctors, white coats, stethoscopes, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: "Is creatine safe for women?" — the honest answer, caveats included.
prompts.compliance_notes: Companion to script EDU06/OBJ03: research framing + pregnancy/breastfeeding exclusion + GP referral. Never a blanket 'safe' promise.

prompts.prompt: Playful minimal still: pouch standing on a pastel plinth with a small folded card tent beside it reading a guarantee message, soft studio light, confident simple composition, premium DTC aesthetic
prompts.negative_prompt: money imagery, cash, medical imagery, before and after, body transformation, fake review stars, trust badges, official seals, children, pregnancy imagery, third-party logos, watermark
prompts.on_screen_text: Hate the taste? We refund the pouch. 30 days.
prompts.compliance_notes: Guarantee is flavour-based refund — never imply a results guarantee.
